content:images:1:15.name: Image
content:images:1:15.description: Reference to image ZUIDs in Zesty.io

content:textarea:3:2.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:3:2.html: “While Women weep, as they do now, I’ll fight. While little children go hungry, as they do now, I’ll fight. While men go to prison, in and out, in and out, as they do now, I’ll fight. While there is a drunkard left, while there is a poor lost girl upon the streets, while there remains one dark soul without the light of God, I’ll fight. I’ll Fight to the very end!”
content:textarea:3:2.content: “While Women weep, as they do now, I’ll fight. While little children go hungry, as they do now, I’ll fight. While men go to prison, in and out, in and out, as they do now, I’ll fight. While there is a drunkard left, while there is a poor lost girl upon the streets, while there remains one dark soul without the light of God, I’ll fight. I’ll Fight to the very end!”

content:wysiwyg_basic:5:7.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:5:7.html:
How we help overcome poverty

Each night in the United States, 17.4 million families go to bed hungry.
An additional 6.9 million families live on the verge of food insecurity.
That means they don’t always know where their next meal is coming from.
content:wysiwyg_basic:5:7.content:

content:wysiwyg_basic:8:31.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:8:31.html: No one should should go hungry in Central Alabama.  Our food pantries offer meal items and food staples to keep cabinets and cupboards full.  If you are in need of food assistance in Birmingham, call 205-328-2420.  If you are in need of food assistance in Bessemer, call 205-425-4303.  If you are in need of food assistance in Shelby or Chilton counties, please call 205-663-7105.
content:wysiwyg_basic:8:31.content: No one should should go hungry in Central Alabama.  Our food pantries offer meal items and food staples to keep cabinets and cupboards full.  If you are in need of food assistance in Birmingham, call 205-328-2420.  If you are in need of food assistance in Bessemer, call 205-425-4303.  If you are in need of food assistance in Shelby or Chilton counties, please call 205-663-7105.

content:textarea:11:41.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:11:41.html: The holidays should not be filled with worry.  Many families in our service area receive holiday meal boxes for Thanksgiving or Christmas.  These boxes contain everything needed to make a complete, healthy, and happy holiday meal.

content:wysiwyg_basic:13:33.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:13:33.html: Homelessness can happen to anyone.  the Center of Hope offers a clean and safe place for women, men, children, families, and Veterans to find hope.  in 2022, we provided 44,863 Nights of Shelter to our neighbors.  If you are in need of emergency shelter, please call 205-328-2420.

content:textarea:16:67.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:16:67.html: The Salvation Army understands the impact of unexpected life changes. Maybe you lost your job. Maybe you're a senior living on a fixed income. Maybe you're living with a long-term disability. If so, we are here for you.
content:textarea:16:67.content: The Salvation Army understands the impact of unexpected life changes. Maybe you lost your job. Maybe you're a senior living on a fixed income. Maybe you're living with a long-term disability. If so, we are here for you.
content:textarea:16:67.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:93-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:17:4.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:17:4.html: Throughout the country, The Salvation Army's emergency assistance programs are helping families pay their bills so they can keep the power and water on, fill prescriptions, and access transportation when necessary.
content:textarea:17:4.content: Throughout the country, The Salvation Army's emergency assistance programs are helping families pay their bills so they can keep the power and water on, fill prescriptions, and access transportation when necessary.
content:textarea:17:4.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:25:93-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:18:90.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:18:90.html: Assistance is available to help reduce the financial and emotional burdens associated with housing rental and utilities.
content:textarea:18:90.content: Assistance is available to help reduce the financial and emotional burdens associated with housing rental and utilities.

content:textarea:19:53.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:19:53.html: The Salvation Army connects people with the resources they need to help their families stay afloat.
